Tests the behavior of the modulus operation with NaN in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses the `assert` function to verify the behavior of the modulus operator with `NaN` (Not-a-Number) in JavaScript. It checks that the result of the expression `NaN % 1` is `NaN`, which is consistent with the IEEE 754 standard for floating-point arithmetic. The script provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific mathematical operation to ensure that it behaves as expected. This is useful for validating the correctness of JavaScript's handling of special numeric values.
